name: Policy: eligible or not?
note: Should say not eligible (part-time AND contractor both excluded)
response: No, as you are a part-time contractor, you are not eligible for remote work according to the Remote Work Policy of TechCorp Inc.

name: Policy: complex scenario
note: Should mention VP approval needed for fully remote engineering leads
response: As an engineering lead who has completed your probation period, you are eligible to work from home up to 3 days per week. However, you must schedule these remote days when you are not required to be in the office, keeping in mind the mandatory Tuesday and Thursday office days. To work from home on these days, you need to obtain the manager's approval 48 hours in advance. This approval is required when you are not required to be in the office and when you are not working from home.
